reasoning: The A1 interface exhibits the highest severity anomalies and is the highest level of the control plane hierarchy. Downstream interfaces (E2, F1-c, F1-u) are affected because the Near-RT RIC is receiving corrupted or incomplete policy updates via A1. Since the Non-RT RIC is not affected, the failure is isolated to the transport/link of the A1 interface.
actionable_steps: Perform a physical and logical audit of the A1 interface. Check for network congestion, faulty cabling, or misconfigured MTU settings between the Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC to eliminate packet loss.
